topic: The spare key under my flowerpot is replaced with a different key every Monday morning
title: The Spare Key Under My Flowerpot Is Replaced with a Different Key Every Monday | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: The spare key under my flowerpot is replaced with a different key every Monday morning.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a terra cotta flowerpot tilted up on a porch revealing a single silver key on the concrete beneath, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Front porch. Terra cotta pot. Brass house key for twelve years.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a small wooden residential porch with a single terra cotta flowerpot beside the door, dim ambient light, no people, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I water the plant Sunday evenings.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a hand pouring water from a metal can into a small terra cotta flowerpot on a porch, only the hand visible, dim dusk light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Picked up the key last spring. It was silver.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a hand holding a small silver key on a porch beside an upturned terra cotta flowerpot, only the hand visible, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Brass key still on my keyring. The silver key did not fit my door.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a brass key inserted into a residential front door lock, only the hand and key visible, dim porch light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Tested every lock on my property. None matched.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a small wooden side table with three different door locks lined up beside a silver key, dim garage light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Photographed and saved the key. Next Monday a different one.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a wooden drawer with five different keys laid out in a row on a paper towel, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Thirty seven keys now. None match anything on my street.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a wooden table covered with thirty seven different keys arranged in a grid pattern, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Tried the most recent key in my neighbor's mailbox.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a hand inserting a small key into a residential mailbox lock at the end of a driveway, only the hand visible, dim afternoon light, vertical 9:16 framing
close detail of a residential mailbox door swung open showing a single white envelope inside, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I have stopped trying the keys.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a wooden drawer being slid closed over a pile of thirty seven different keys, only the hand visible, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: This Monday the key was my own original brass house key. Bent. Like it had been used.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a single brass house key resting on a porch with a slight bend in the metal teeth, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing
